steps.title: Substitute x = -3 into the function
steps.content: We have h(x) = 5|x| and need to find h(-3). Substitute x = -3 directly: $$h(-3) = 5|-3|$$

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value and multiply
steps.content: The absolute value of −3 is 3. Now multiply: $$h(-3) = 5 \cdot 3 = 15$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
